Metadata.title: Yi Credit Platform
Metadata.description: Monorepo starter with Next 14, Expo, Clerk, intl, Tailwind and more.

Home.headline: Ship finance experiences faster
Home.subhead: Internationalized, authenticated and styled out of the box. Connect payments, storage, AI, and realtime in minutes.
Home.featureTitle: Everything wired for a credit platform

features.title: Authentication
features.body: Clerk is pre-wired for multi-lingual sign-in/sign-up pages and protected routes.

features.title: Data
features.body: Prisma + Postgres ready; add your schema, run generate, and start querying.

features.title: Files & Rich text
features.body: UploadThing + S3, Tiptap, Quill and WangEditor for editing documents.

cta.title: Need sockets, AI streams, or webhooks? Hooks are scaffolded.

stack.title: Included stack
items: Next.js App Router + next-intl + Clerk middleware
Tailwind + Ant Design + Radix Themes + next-themes
UploadThing + AWS S3 presigns, Stripe/Nodemailer hooks
PDF/docx generation, OpenAI + SSE streaming utilities

stats.realtime: Socket.IO hook point ready for live credit events.
stats.ai: OpenAI client + eventsource parser for streaming responses.
stats.payments: Stripe client placeholder for invoices and webhook flows.
